title: Born after 2008? UK brings in tough new rule you may never be allowed to buy cigarettes
summary_full: The UK is implementing a groundbreaking law to effectively ban smoking for future generations by progressively raising the legal age to buy tobacco. This phased approach aims to significantly reduce smoking-related deaths and healthcare costs without impacting current smokers. New vaping regulations are also introduced to protect young people, marking a historic step in public health.
